bead.title: refactor(svelte): add All Beads cross-project link to NavShell top-level
bead.description: Opus Stage 4 batch review (2026-04-15): the cross-project beads view at /nodes/[nodeId]/beads (Stage 4.8, de83f80) is unreachable from the nav. NavShell.svelte:20-28 only lists per-project pages. Add a top-level 'All beads' link outside the project scope, or decide it's deep-link-only and document so.
bead.acceptance: (1) Either: NavShell has an 'All beads' link hitting /nodes/[nodeId]/beads regardless of selected project, OR the cross-project view is documented as intentional deep-link-only with rationale. (2) bun run check green.
